calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-24-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-24-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.
David G. Mendez, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Mahendra Arvind, who was placed under oath and testified.
No Appearance by defendant Joe Kegel.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial filed February 29, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Three Day Notice to Pay Rent or Quit dated 01/29/08------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Mahendra Arvind and against defendant JOE KEGEL as follows:

Plaintiff Mahendra Arvind shall recover from defendant JOE KEGEL Rent and Per Diem damages in the sum of $2,797.00, Costs in the amount of 230.00, for a Total Judgment for plaintiff Mahendra Arvind in the amount of $3,027.00.
Plaintiff Mahendra Arvind is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 910-924 Geary St., #20, San Francisco, CA 94109. The lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-19-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mahendra Arvind, plaintiff
David Gerard Mendez, Esq., counsel for plaintiff

No appearance by defendant Joe Kegel.

Settlement conference off calendar. Trial date remains.

Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk Linda Fong, not reported (218)
